name: codeheures-fr/scrutineer
description: Scrutineer — in-app manual acceptance testing console. Framework-agnostic, contract-driven (PHP back).

suggest.doctrine/doctrine-migrations-bundle: To generate the ledger migration from config via scrutineer:generate-migration.
suggest.symfony/mailer: To capture staging mails (scrutineer.mail_capture) into an in-app inbox instead of delivering them.
suggest.symfony/mime: Required alongside symfony/mailer when mail capture is enabled.
